description.register: Set up a passkey for your account "{{username}}". You will use it to sign in without a password.

error.login-failed: Sign-in failed. Check the username and your passkey, or ask an admin for a new registration link.
error.invalid-token: This registration link is invalid or expired. Ask an admin for a new one.

toast.passkey-created: Passkey created — you can sign in now.
